title: Redfin Property Details Scraper
description: Fetch detailed Redfin property records by property ID or Redfin URL. Use property_ids or urls to process multiple properties in one Apify run.

property_id.title: Property ID
property_id.description: Single Redfin property ID. Example: 60791456 from a Redfin URL ending in /home/60791456.

property_ids.title: Property IDs
property_ids.description: Batch of Redfin property IDs to process in one Apify run.

urls.title: Redfin URLs
urls.description: Batch of Redfin property URLs containing /home/{property_id}.
